## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Trek Health and GrowthX to explore potential collaboration on content marketing and SEO strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Trek Health recently secured a $10-11M Series A, led by Coatue, and is looking to expand marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [GrowthX offers an AI-powered content marketing service with human expertise, producing 50-100k words/month at $0.10/word](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Trek Health is interested in GrowthX's services, particularly their programmatic SEO capabilities to compete with Turquoise Health](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Next steps include a deeper dive meeting with Trek's CTO and Chief of Staff to discuss potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)

## Topics

### Company Backgrounds and Recent Developments

  - [Trek Health:](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
      - [Founded 3 years ago, pivoted 14 months ago to focus on healthcare contract negotiations](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
      - [Recently signed term sheet for $10-11M Series A led by Coatue](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Looking to expand beyond sales and engineering to build marketing and customer success teams](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [GrowthX:](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Founded by Marcel Santilli, former growth leader at companies like Scale AI and HashiCorp](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
      - [Recently closed their seed round](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
      - [Offers AI-powered content marketing services with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)

### GrowthX's Content Marketing Approach

  - [Combines AI tools with human expertise for content creation and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [12-week pilot program followed by 12-month contracts](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [Publishes 50-100k words/month at $0.10/word](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Uses proprietary AI workflow engine for content generation and management](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Team structure includes managing directors (former growth leaders) and specialized pods](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)

### Trek Health's Marketing Needs

  - [Looking to build out marketing presence to compete with venture-backed competitor](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Interested in programmatic SEO strategy similar to competitor Turquoise Health](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Planning to hire a head of marketing soon](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Wants to ensure GrowthX services complement internal team building efforts](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Programmatic SEO for healthcare pricing transparency data](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Content strategy development and execution](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Flexible engagement model to work alongside Trek's growing internal marketing team](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a deep dive meeting with Trek's CTO and Chief of Staff](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct further research on Trek's competitors and industry](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [GrowthX to add Trek to a shared Slack channel for easier coordination](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [Aim for follow-up meeting on Monday or Tuesday of the coming week](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Trek to involve incoming head of marketing in discussions once hired](https://fathom.video/share/1ri4GBTeA2xDxtkwJdMSRqGa714vTAKQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
